industry_sectors.title: Construction
industry_sectors.summary: Concrete cleaning, equipment upkeep, rust removal, and site cleanup on active jobs — easier to store on site, safer to have around the crew.
industry_sectors.image_alt: Exterior concrete cleaned with VertKleen CR

industry_sectors.title: Distribution / Cold Storage
industry_sectors.summary: Refrigerated bays, ammonia coils, forklifts, kitchen grease, and drain lines in perishable distribution centers — backed by documented results from Walmart DSC.
industry_sectors.image_alt: Walmart distribution center degreasing proof for VertKleen CRHD

industry_sectors.title: Education
industry_sectors.summary: K-12 and university facilities can clean and treat systems with students and staff still on campus. Brevard County Schools is the reference account.
industry_sectors.image_alt: VertKleen chemistry line for campus facility programs

industry_sectors.title: Food & Beverage
industry_sectors.summary: CIP/SIP, hoods, floors, drains, and tanks — with CR and HCR proven on brewery and distillery jobs.

industry_sectors.title: Healthcare
industry_sectors.summary: Clean, passivate, and service water systems with patients still in the building — no fume events, no evacuations, no shutting a wing to do maintenance.
industry_sectors.image_alt: Occupied-facility HVAC coil cleaned with VertKleen

industry_sectors.title: HVAC / Water Treatment
industry_sectors.summary: Cooling tower programs built on WaterSafe60 inhibitor, Purgo minimum-risk antimicrobial, HCR passivation, CR pH control, and the ASHRAE 188 paperwork to back them.
industry_sectors.image_label: View HVAC and Water Treatment proof photo

industry_sectors.title: Manufacturing
industry_sectors.summary: Heavy-duty cleaning for extrusion, processing, warehousing, and plant maintenance — get the line running again with less HazCom paperwork to answer for.
industry_sectors.image_alt: Industrial steel surface derusted with VertKleen HCR

industry_sectors.title: Marine
industry_sectors.summary: Wash, brighten, and degrease vessels in confined air, on soft metal, against salt and corrosion — where the wrong chemical does damage of its own.
industry_sectors.image_alt: Yellowfin vessel washed with VertKleen Torque

industry_sectors.title: Military / Government
industry_sectors.summary: MASEST sells through SAM.gov under CAGE 0B2Q3 and NAICS 424690, ready for federal, state, local, and public-facility buyers.
industry_sectors.image_alt: Rust removed from defense-contractor equipment with VertKleen HCR

industry_sectors.title: Oil & Gas
industry_sectors.summary: Descale, derust, and degrease rigs, terminals, and pipelines without acid fumes, a solvent storage cabinet, or hazmat freight.
industry_sectors.image_alt: Industrial pump equipment cleaned with VertKleen chemistry
industry_sectors.image_label: View Oil and Gas proof photo

industry_sectors.title: Plumbing
industry_sectors.summary: Water lines, fixtures, water heaters, and drains cleared of scale and calcium without handling hydrochloric acid — and checked against your metals before occupied-building work.
